title: Tentative-EQS-Froebel Train-the-Trainer Program: Embedding the Froebel Service Excellence Ethos (F2F) Dom Syd
description: Train-the-Trainer Program: Embedding the Froebel Service Excellence Ethos
notes:
31/1/26 Confirmed email with Lucie
26/11/2025 SS DS coffee w Lucie

31/1 DS
We’re truly grateful for the opportunity to work with Froebel again, and it means a great deal to hear the positive feedback from the workshop last year and the follow-up webinar. Please consider the 26th February workshop locked in—we’re excited to be part of this next phase in bringing the Service Excellence ethos to life across your centres.

The adjusted timing works perfectly. We’re happy to commence at 10:00am and will shape the session flow to conclude by 4:30pm, with a shorter lunch break as suggested. The Lyf Hotel venue at Bondi Junction also sounds ideal—thank you for organising that.

We fully appreciate your current position regarding the virtual follow-up sessions. As you suggested, we’re happy for you to sign the SoS with a TBC note in relation to the virtual component. We’re just delighted to be working with your team again and trust that we’ll find the right opportunities to support the implementation journey when the timing works for you.

Confirmed-CCE-Virtuoso Business Storytelling Course: Presenting and Communicating with Impact (F2F) Dom Syd
description: Business Storytelling Course: Presenting and Communicating with Impact
billing:
10/12 Ben
Ben (Centre for Continuing Education)
10 Dec 2025, 09:07 AEDT

Hi Dom and Sue,
 
We're getting pretty close to the end of the year now. I hope you've got something nice planned with the family over the break!
 
I'm pleased to advise that the client accepted the training proposal. Can you please send me some date/time options in January (or even next week if that works) on which Dom is available for a contextualisation meeting.
 
Please see below the training details:
 
Course: Business Storytelling Course: Presenting and Communicating with Impact
 Date and time: 30 January (9am to 5pm)
 Participants: Up to 10 pax 
Delivery mode: Face-to-face
 Payable time: 8 hours course delivery + 1 hour contextualisation meeting
 Course materials: We will send out a copy of the public version of the course materials.
Address of training venue: CCE building, 160 Missenden Rd, Newtown
notes:
21/11/2025 Ben 
Virtuoso have reached out to organise a Business Storytelling Course: Presenting and Communicating with Impact class for their team. They're a travel advisory company, but I don't yet have any detail about the participants' roles within the company. They have 7 participants to train and would like to run the training face-to-face at CCE in early 2026. 25/11 Ben Tentative
20/1 Ben
I hope you're doing well too. Thanks for checking in with us on this.
 As you mentioned, the contextualisation discussion we had with the client last year was had with an understanding on your part and mine that the starting point for the contextualisation was the existing material, so please do proceed with preparing with the existing material. We'll distribute the same materials you've been using in the public program to Virtuoso's participants.
 Just to clarify: the Virtuoso class is scheduled to run on 30 January.
 Thanks again for checking, Dom. Much appreciated.
